name: CPI Food Inflation
description: The food and beverages sub-index of CPI, covering cereals, vegetables, pulses, milk and other staples. It is the most volatile part of headline inflation and the component most exposed to monsoon and harvest swings.
source: Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation (MoSPI)
releaseSchedule: Released monthly alongside headline CPI, around the 12th.

chart.title: Food inflation tracked the rain, with a lag
chart.subtitle: Consumer food price inflation, year-on-year % change, monthly
